title: Solomon perception_agent result schema
description: Per-turn output of the dedicated Stage 6 perception agent. Stored in reasoning_trace.perception_agent_result. All party-level fields are nullable to support fail-safe null results on early turns or exceptions.

_null_result.description: True when no LM call was made (turns 1-2 or exception). All other fields except schema_version/turn_index/timestamp/confidence may be absent.

relational_dynamic.description: LM-assessed cross-party dynamic — richer than the scaffold's rule-derived value.

dynamic_trajectory.description: Direction of change in the relational dynamic over the session so far.

perception_signals.description: Notable patterns or signals observed this turn that the conversational mediator should hold.

scaffold_divergence.description: Where this LM-assessed result disagrees with the deterministic scaffold PerceptionContext. Null when the two assessments are broadly consistent.

perception_notes.description: Key items the conversational mediator must hold before generating a response — passed directly into the main turn prompt.

veto_signals.description: Perception-layer signals relevant to safety or domain readiness. Informational only — the safety monitor owns all structural veto decisions.

partyPerception.description: Perception model for a single party at the current turn.

emotional_state.description: LM-assessed emotional state. Richer and more specific than the scaffold's categorical output.

emotional_trajectory.description: Direction of change in emotional state over the session.

engagement_quality.description: Quality of this party's engagement with the process. compliant_only is a soft perception signal that complements the safety monitor's CATEGORY 1 structural detection.

communication_style.description: How this party is communicating in this session.

inferred_interests.description: Interests inferred from full conversation history, subtext, and pattern — beyond what the scaffold derives from proposals and missing_info.

inferred_concerns.description: What this party appears worried about beneath their stated positions.

unsaid_signals.description: Patterns that suggest what this party is NOT saying. The most valuable new dimension over the scaffold.

relational_posture.description: How this party is relating to the process and the other party at this turn.
